summary: Post-refactoring regression testing COMPLETED. 44/44 backend API tests passed. All 17 features verified via UI testing. Backend was refactored from monolithic server.py into modular routes (auth.py, public.py, admin_content.py, admin_tools.py, payments.py) + models/database.py. NO REGRESSIONS detected.
passed_tests: 1. Homepage loads correctly with all sections in dynamic order
2. Admin login (admin@consultant.com / Admin123!) works - redirects to /admin
3. User login (user@example.com / User123!) works - separate login flow with Google Auth + Forgot Password
4. Admin Blog Manager with list, checkboxes for bulk ops, New Post button
5. Admin Gallery Manager with grid view, checkboxes for bulk delete, Add Photo button
6. Admin Contacts Manager with CSV Export button visible
7. Admin Analytics Dashboard with charts (Monthly Contacts, Monthly Revenue, Content Overview)
8. Admin Section Order Manager with drag-and-drop reordering + toggle switches
9. Admin SEO Manager with per-page meta tags (Homepage, News, Gallery, Reading List)
10. Admin Settings Manager with 6 tabs (General, Colors, Sections, Social Links, Email/SMTP, Blog API)
11. Admin Pages Manager, Users Manager, Purchases Manager all accessible
12. Search bar in navbar returns results from blog, services (tested with 'business' query)
13. Backend: POST /api/upload (image upload with multipart) - tested with PNG
14. Backend: GET /api/admin/analytics returns monthly_contacts, monthly_revenue, content_stats, top_services
15. Backend: GET /api/admin/contacts/export returns CSV file with proper headers
18. Backend: GET/PUT /api/admin/seo working with page_path parameter
seed_data_creation: Test contact created via automated testing (TEST_Contact Person)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring testing complete. All routes work correctly after being split into modular files. Key modules: routes/auth.py (login, logout, session, password reset), routes/public.py (all public content + search), routes/admin_content.py (CRUD for all collections), routes/admin_tools.py (upload, bulk ops, analytics, SEO, section order), routes/payments.py (Stripe checkout). models/database.py contains shared db, auth helpers, SMTP email function.

verified_refactored_modules.models/database.py: MongoDB connection, JWT auth, password hashing, get_current_user, require_admin, send_email_smtp
verified_refactored_modules.routes/auth.py: POST /auth/login, GET /auth/me, POST /auth/logout, POST /auth/session, POST /auth/forgot-password, POST /auth/reset-password, POST /auth/change-password
verified_refactored_modules.routes/public.py: All /public/* endpoints (settings, hero, about, services, blog, books, maps, gallery, portfolio, testimonials, sections, pages, nav-pages, seo) + /blog/latest + /contact + /search
